summary: Three isolated fixes implemented correctly. (1) Timezone-safe query: findBySubscriptionAndDate uses DSL.field("DATE({0} AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')") for UTC-explicit date comparison. (2) Webhook URL masking: webhookUrl.substringBefore("?") used in both info and error log statements. (3) Configurable timeouts: PipelineProperties.WebhookConfig with connectTimeoutMs/readTimeoutMs defaults, WebhookRestTemplateConfig reads from pipelineProperties.webhook.

codeQuality.timezone_fix: Uses AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' PostgreSQL syntax via jOOQ DSL.field - correctly handles timezone-independent date comparison
codeQuality.security: webhookUrl.substringBefore("?") prevents query parameter secrets from leaking into logs. Test 'should send webhook to URL with query params and mask URL in logs' validates this.
codeQuality.configuration: WebhookConfig nested in PipelineProperties follows existing AsyncConfig pattern. @ConstructorBinding with defaults.
codeQuality.testing: WebhookRestTemplateConfigTest verifies configurable timeouts. PipelineWebhookNotifierIT tests URL masking behavior.
